lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Arianwyn. What are we going to do about the Temple of Light?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: First of all, we need to know how close the Iorwerth elves are to finding it. Return to the Mourner Headquarters and gain access to their mine. Once there, see what you can discover about the temple.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I’ll head over there right away.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Thank you friend. Don’t forget your disguise.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have the key to the excavation site yet?

lines.speaker: Essylt
lines.text: The guard has finally returned. Seems it took him so long because he had ten times more cut than we needed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That’s useful. I’m always losing keys.

lines.speaker: Essylt
lines.text: Well I have plenty now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So… You mentioned a task you had for me, something to do with the mines?

lines.speaker: Essylt
lines.text: That’s right. One of our dig teams has gone missing while searching for the temple. I need you to find out what happened to them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough.

lines.speaker: Essylt
lines.text: You say that now but the beasts in the mines are deadly, you’ll have to be very careful in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I’ll be on my guard.

lines.speaker: Essylt
lines.text: Good, you will need this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I’ll get to work.

lines.speaker: Essylt
lines.text: Good luck in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well this looks like the dig team, and it seems they managed to find the temple. I’d better let Arianwyn know before the Mourners find out.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: [Player name], what is the latest news?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I have found the entrance to the temple. It looks like one of the dig crews discovered it. They were killed by some strange shadows though, so the other mourners don’t know about it yet.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: This isn’t good, it will only be a matter of time before they discover the temple.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do we do?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: I did some research while you were gone. Apparently, the temple was built with safeguards to prevent all but Seren's chosen from entering.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: If there are shadows roaming outside the temple, it means those safeguards have long since decayed. I believe we can still restore them though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: The temple guards an ancient altar, one with powers over life and death. I suspect this altar is why Lord Iorwerth is so keen to access the temple.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You think he means to use it to summon the Dark Lord?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Indeed. Now, the altar is also key to the safeguards on the temple. We will need to use it to restore them.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: First, I need you to return to the temple and find the crystal that is powering the safeguards. As they are no long working, I expect the crystal will be black in colour.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Bring me a sample of this crystal. We will then determine our next steps.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is this it?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Yes! Good work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I found it on the top floor of the temple.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Well done, with this sample, a good crystal chanter should be able to make a replacement. Just a second, I will summon Eluned.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Thank you for responding to my summons Eluned.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Any time Arianwyn, how can I help?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: [Player name] here has an old crystal sample, we need you to make a replacement for it.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Alright, hand it here and I shall take a look.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: Now, let me see… Hmm… Ah, there we go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Eluned
lines.text: No problem, Arianwyn will tell you what you should do with it. Now I had better get going, see you round.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the new crystal, now what am I meant to do with it?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: You will need to first take the newly formed crystal to the end of the temple and place it on the altar there. This will imbue the crystal with the power it needs to safeguard the temple.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is starting to sound hard.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: It should be quite simple. Once you have powered up the newly formed crystal, you will need to return to the blackened crystal and place the new shard with others. This should restore the safeguards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And that’s it?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Yes, that is all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right then, I’ll get to it.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: ‘Ere… How’d you get in ‘ere?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Funny, I was just going to ask you the same thing.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Well I asked first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I battled my way through hordes of shadows, whilst trying to solve a huge maze that I had to bounce a light beam around. Now your turn.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: I came in through this hole in the back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean there’s an easy way?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Not easy as such. A few of the boys and me set up an outpost at the other end of the tunnel, at the bottom of a huge cavern. The only way to get there is through caves riddled with traps.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on, this sounds familiar. Is the name of one of your companions Klank?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Yes, how did you know that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He’s a friend of mine, he made me a great pair of gauntlets.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Wait… You must be [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That’s right. How did you know that?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Klank told me about you, told me how you got rid of that Iban fellow. As it’s you, I’ll make you an offer, I’ll trade you a Death Talisman. You’ll need it if you want to access this altar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, but I have one.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Well if you wanna ‘nother, just come back and I’ll tell you what I need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great… Wait, what for?

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: I just need a few things, here I’ll make you a list.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right I’d better get started, see you soon.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Hi again, how’re you doing with those items we need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I’ve got some of them with me.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Great, can I take everything I need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah sure.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Thanks, I've updated your list for you.

lines.speaker: Thorgel
lines.text: Great, thank you so much for getting all that for us! Here take this Death Talisman as a reward. Anytime you want another one of those Talismans come see me and I'll sort you out with another list.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good news Arianwyn, I’ve repaired the safeguards on the Temple of Light.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: This is good news indeed, [player name]. That should stop anyone from entering for another thousand years.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm… not quite. It seems some dwarves have managed to tunnel through to the back of the temple.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Some dwarves?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. They’ve set up an outpost in the Underground Pass.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: This is interesting news. I will send an envoy down to speak with them. We must ensure all access into the temple is secure.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: Even still, I can’t see Lord Iorwerth discovering this tunnel any time soon. For now, he should have no way to summon the Dark Lord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what happens next?

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: This isn’t the end by any means. The Iorwerth forces are still at large and we are not strong enough to stop them. However, with the temple secure, the main threat has been dealt with.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: I will let you know if there are any further developments. For now though, your work is done.

lines.speaker: Arianwyn
lines.text: I can’t offer much of a reward I’m afraid. However, I did have Eluned make this for you. It should allow you to bypass the defences on the temple.
